intro: Academia, healthcare, industrial, and research sectors were the primary targets of a concentrated wave of remote code execution attacks documented in 18 articles between April 12 and 20, 2026. The activity included 12 critical and six high-severity vulnerabilities, with the most prominent being CVE-2025-54987 (CVSS 9.8), CVE-2025-0520 (CVSS 9.4), and CVE-2026-39987 (CVSS 9.3). Additional significant flaws exploited were CVE-2026-22898 and CVE-2026-4682, both rated at CVSS 8.8. This cluster of high-impact exploits underscores a focused period of significant risk across critical infrastructure and institutional networks.
